teacherDashboard.getStarted: Get started by creating an exam, uploading documents, or opening Teaching Studio.
teacherDashboard.contactAdmin: Contact your school admin to be assigned to classes

teacherTokens.title: Tokens
teacherTokens.subtitle: Your token balance and usage. AI features (exams, lessons, courses, AI tutor) use tokens.
teacherTokens.emptyState: No token usage yet. Generate a lesson, exam, or use the AI tutor to see activity here.

teacherDocuments.title: Document library
teacherDocuments.subtitle: Upload, group, and manage your teaching materials in one place
teacherDocuments.uploadFileTypes: PDF, Word (.doc, .docx), Markdown, or Text up to 15MB
teacherDocuments.uploadInvalidType: Please upload a PDF, Word (.doc, .docx), Markdown (.md), or Text (.txt) file
teacherDocuments.uploadTooLarge: File size must be 15MB or less
teacherDocuments.explorerNoDocumentsDescription: Drag and drop a file above to upload your first document
teacherDocuments.explorerNoDocumentsWithTagHint: Try another tag or clear the filter above.
teacherDocuments.explorerEditDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "#TITLE#"? This action cannot be undone and the file will be permanently removed.
teacherDocuments.explorerQualityContentLanguageHint: Detected automatically. Used for cross-language RAG query translation.
teacherDocuments.explorerQualityGoodDescription: Text was extracted and chunked successfully. This document is suitable for exams and lessons.
teacherDocuments.explorerQualityLowDescription: AI-generated content may be less accurate. Prefer documents with selectable text and fewer images.
teacherDocuments.explorerQualityFailedDescription: This document may not be used reliably for generating exams or lessons. Try re-uploading a PDF with selectable text.

teacherCourses.title: Courses
teacherCourses.subtitle: Create and manage self-paced courses for your students
teacherCourses.searchPlaceholder: Search courses by title, description, or code…
teacherCourses.noMatchingHint: Try a different search term, or clear your filters.
teacherCourses.createFirstHint: Create your first self-paced course using AI
teacherCourses.deleteConfirmWithContent: This course has {lessons} lesson(s) and {finalExam}. Deleting will remove the course and all of them from your list. This cannot be undone.
teacherCourses.deleteConfirmWithContentNoExam: This course has {lessons} lesson(s) and no final exam. Deleting will remove the course and all lessons from your list. This cannot be undone.
teacherCourses.deleteConfirmWithContentExam: This course has {lessons} lesson(s) and 1 final exam. Deleting will remove the course and all of them from your list. This cannot be undone.
teacherCourses.deleteConfirmEmpty: Are you sure you want to delete this course? This action cannot be undone. The course will be archived and hidden from your course list.

teacherCourseDetail.deleteConfirmWithContent: This course has {lessons} lesson(s) and {finalExam}. Deleting will remove the course and all of them from your list. This cannot be undone.
teacherCourseDetail.deleteConfirmEmpty: Are you sure you want to delete this course? This action cannot be undone. The course will be archived and hidden from your course list.
teacherCourseDetail.contentGeneratingMessage: Your course "{title}" was created. Lessons{lessonsCount} and the final exam are still being generated and combined in the background.
teacherCourseDetail.contentGeneratingHint: This usually takes a few minutes. Refresh the page to see when lessons and exam are ready.

teacherCourseRun.noLessonsYet: This course doesn't have any lessons yet.
teacherCourseRun.readyToTake: Ready to take — click to start
teacherCourseRun.examMasteryMessage: Complete the final exam to demonstrate your mastery of the course material.
teacherCourseRun.examPassingMessage: Passing this exam (70% or higher) indicates successful completion of the course.

teacherChat.title: EduBot
teacherChat.subtitle: Lesson planning, exams, teaching strategies. Use your documents for context.
teacherChat.newSessionDialogDescription: Give your tutor session a name to help you organize your learning conversations
teacherChat.sessionTitlePlaceholder: e.g., Math Lesson Planning, Exam Questions Help, Science Curriculum...
teacherChat.selectedDocsRagHint: Selected documents will be used for RAG (context-aware responses)
teacherChat.noSessionsStudent: No tutor sessions from your classes yet.
teacherChat.startNewSession: Start a new session to begin.
teacherChat.askQuestionToStart: Ask a question below to start.
teacherChat.inputPlaceholder: Ask about lesson planning, exams, teaching strategies...
teacherChat.chooseSessionStudent: Choose a tutor session from the list to start.
teacherChat.createOrSelectSession: Create a new session or select one from the list.
teacherChat.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation?

teacherExams.title: Exams
teacherExams.subtitle: Create and manage your exams
teacherExams.createFirstExam: Create your first exam using AI to generate questions
teacherExams.deleteExamConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this exam? This action cannot be undone and all exam data will be permanently removed.
teacherExams.exportToExcelTitle: Export questions with answers to Excel (CSV)

teacherExamCreate.title: Create New Exam
teacherExamCreate.subtitle: Create an exam manually or generate questions with AI

teacherExamEdit.title: Edit Exam
teacherExamEdit.subtitle: Modify your exam questions and settings

teacherExamCreator.topicsEmptyHint: Click "Add Topic" to focus on specific subjects. Optionally set how many questions per topic (e.g. 10 from Intro, 80 from Chapter 2).
teacherExamCreator.leaveEmptyHint: Leave empty to generate from all document content
teacherExamCreator.topicsTotalHint: topics. Set "Questions" per topic to lock total count.
teacherExamCreator.difficultyHint: Easy + Medium + Hard = total. Change one and the others update.
teacherExamCreator.generateWaitHint: This may take 1–2 minutes for large exams. Do not close the page. If something fails, the error will appear at the top.
teacherExamCreator.afterExamHint: Control what students see when they view their results.
teacherExamCreator.examTitleSaveHint: This title will be used when you save the exam.
teacherExamCreator.errorSelectDocument: Please select at least one document
teacherExamCreator.errorNoQuestionsExport: There are no questions to export.
teacherExamCreator.errorNoQuestionsSave: Please add at least one question
teacherExamCreator.successExportCsv: Questions exported as CSV. You can open it in Excel.
teacherExamCreator.errorGeneratedSaveFailed: Generated questions but failed to save:
teacherExamCreator.questionEditorExplanationPlaceholder: Explain why this answer is correct...

teacherLessons.title: Lessons
teacherLessons.subtitle: Create and manage lesson plans for your classes
teacherLessons.createFirstLesson: Create your first lesson plan to get started
teacherLessons.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this lesson?

teacherEducationPlans.title: Education Plans
teacherEducationPlans.subtitle: Create and manage curriculum plans per class. Share plans with students so they can see the full schedule.
teacherEducationPlans.createFirstPlan: Create your first plan for a class and share it with students.
teacherEducationPlans.shareHint: Students in this class can see the plan when it's shared. They'll see it under the class → Plan tab.
teacherEducationPlans.deletePlanConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this education plan?
teacherEducationPlans.createSubtitle: Set up a curriculum plan for a class. Generate with AI (saved automatically) or build an empty plan and fill it in.
teacherEducationPlans.outputLanguageHint: AI will generate week titles, topics and objectives in this language.
teacherEducationPlans.baseOnDocumentsHint: Select documents to align the plan content with. Leave empty for a general structure.
teacherEducationPlans.noDocumentsYet: No documents yet. Upload in Teaching Studio → Documents.
teacherEducationPlans.planGeneratedNotSaved: Plan was generated but could not be saved. Please try again.
teacherEducationPlans.editSubtitle: Update plan name, description, schedule, and week-by-week content.
teacherEducationPlans.planContentHint: Edit titles, topics, objectives, and notes for each week.

teacherTeachingStudio.title: Teaching Studio
teacherTeachingStudio.subtitle: Your content command center: build a knowledge base, generate lessons and assessments, then deliver and track learning across your classes.
teacherTeachingStudio.step1Desc: Add PDFs, slides, notes, and resources.
teacherTeachingStudio.step2Desc: Create lessons and exams from your knowledge base.
teacherTeachingStudio.step3Desc: Assign to classes and manage on your calendar.
teacherTeachingStudio.createManageContentDesc: Everything you need to build your curriculum and assessments.
teacherTeachingStudio.tileDocumentsDesc: Store PDFs, slides, and reference materials that power your lessons, exams, and AI generation.
teacherTeachingStudio.tileExamsDesc: Design and generate assessments from your documents with smart question generation and translations.
teacherTeachingStudio.tileLessonsDesc: Turn ideas and documents into structured lessons, ready to assign to classes or schedule on the calendar.
teacherTeachingStudio.tileCoursesDesc: Bundle lessons, documents, and exams into complete courses that you can run with your classes.
teacherTeachingStudio.tileAiTutorDesc: Use AI to generate questions, summarize materials, and co-create learning content from your resources.

teacherApiIntegration.title: API Integration
teacherApiIntegration.subtitle: Use your own apps to generate new exams and generate new lessons via the Eduator API.
teacherApiIntegration.notEnabledMessage: Your school administrator has not enabled API integration for your account. Contact your administrator to get access to API keys and third-party integrations.
teacherApiIntegration.step1: Create an API key and copy the two endpoints (exam and lesson generation) with real request bodies and options.
teacherApiIntegration.step2: See how many requests were made, how many succeeded or failed, and per-key and per-endpoint breakdown.

teacherSettings.title: Settings
teacherSettings.subtitle: Manage your account settings
teacherSettings.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
teacherSettings.enterprisePasswordNotice: Your password is managed by your organization's School Administrator. For password changes, please contact your administrator.
teacherSettings.contactAdminName: Contact your School Administrator to update your name
teacherSettings.contactAdminEmail: Contact your School Administrator to update your email

teacherLessonGenerate.title: Generate AI Lesson
teacherLessonGenerate.subtitle: Create a comprehensive lesson from your documents using AI
teacherLessonGenerate.sourceDocumentsHint: Select one or more documents. The lesson will use content from all selected documents for this topic.
teacherLessonGenerate.noDocumentsOption: No documents available. Please upload a document first.
teacherLessonGenerate.topicPlaceholder: e.g., Introduction to Photosynthesis, The Water Cycle, Quadratic Equations...
teacherLessonGenerate.topicHint: Be specific about what aspect of the document you want to create a lesson about.
teacherLessonGenerate.objectivesHint: Leave empty to let AI generate objectives automatically, or provide your own to guide the lesson content.
teacherLessonGenerate.objectivesPlaceholder:
e.g.,
• Students will understand the process of photosynthesis
• Students will be able to explain the role of chlorophyll
• Students will identify the inputs and outputs of photosynthesis
teacherLessonGenerate.gradeLevelHint: The lesson complexity, vocabulary, and examples will be tailored to this level.
teacherLessonGenerate.includeAiImagesDesc: Generate 2-3 educational images for the lesson
teacherLessonGenerate.generateAudioDesc: Create TTS audio of the lesson content
teacherLessonGenerate.centerAlignDesc: Center the lesson text for better readability
teacherLessonGenerate.comparisonTablesDesc: Include markdown tables for definitions, comparisons, or structured data
teacherLessonGenerate.keyFiguresDesc: Include 1–2 figure/diagram descriptions that can be illustrated
teacherLessonGenerate.chartsDataDesc: Include chart-like data (tables or descriptions of trends)
teacherLessonGenerate.lengthHint: Short ≈ 1–2 pages, Medium ≈ 3–4 pages, Full ≈ 6–8 pages
teacherLessonGenerate.progressTip: Tip: images and audio can add extra time. You can turn them off in options.
teacherLessonGenerate.errorSelectDocumentAndTopic: Please select a document and enter a topic
teacherLessonGenerate.errorSelectDocumentsAndTopic: Please select at least one document and enter a topic
teacherLessonGenerate.errorLoadDocuments: Failed to load documents. Please refresh the page.
teacherLessonGenerate.errorInvalidResponse: Invalid response from server. Please try again.
teacherLessonGenerate.errorParseResponse: Failed to parse server response. Please try again.

teacherLessonDetail.chooseBestAnswers: Choose the best answers. When you are ready, click
teacherLessonDetail.noExamples: No examples available for this lesson
teacherLessonDetail.noTestQuestions: No test questions available for this lesson
teacherLessonDetail.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.

teacherCourseCreate.title: AI Curriculum Architect
teacherCourseCreate.subtitle: Transform documents into dynamic, multi-level courses
teacherCourseCreate.step1Subtitle: Select documents to build your course from
teacherCourseCreate.step3Subtitle: Fine-tune how lessons and the final exam are generated (all optional).
teacherCourseCreate.courseTopicPlaceholder: e.g., Climate Change, Algebra Basics, World War II...
teacherCourseCreate.courseTopicHint: Focus the course on a specific topic or theme. Leave empty to use all document content.
teacherCourseCreate.lessonTopicsHint: Specify topics or names for each lesson. Leave empty to let AI generate automatically.
teacherCourseCreate.generateAudioDesc: Create TTS audio of the lesson content.
teacherCourseCreate.centerAlignDesc: Center lesson text for better readability.
teacherCourseCreate.comparisonTablesDesc: Include tables for definitions or comparisons in each lesson.
teacherCourseCreate.chartsDataDesc: Include chart-like data or trend descriptions where helpful.
teacherCourseCreate.lengthHint: Short ≈ 1–2 pages, Medium ≈ 3–4 pages, Full ≈ 6–8 pages.
teacherCourseCreate.questionsAutoCalc: Leave empty to auto-calculate based on number of lessons.
teacherCourseCreate.examTimeLimitHint: Leave empty for auto (~2 min per question). Set your own for full control.
teacherCourseCreate.questionTypesHint: Select which question formats to include in the exam.
teacherCourseCreate.difficultyDistributionHint: Set the percentage of easy, medium, and hard questions.
teacherCourseCreate.difficultyAutoBalanceHint: Set percentages; values are converted to counts out of {count}. Total auto-balances to 100%.
teacherCourseCreate.step4Subtitle: AI is building your course structure and lessons
teacherCourseCreate.step5Subtitle: Your course has been generated. Access code:
teacherCourseCreate.selectAtLeastOneDocument: Please select at least one document
teacherCourseCreate.documentsReady: I have found {count} document(s) ready to build your course.

teacherFinalExamDetail.summaryDescription: Overview of what this final exam contains and when it runs.
teacherFinalExamDetail.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this final exam?

teacherClasses.title: My Classes
teacherClasses.subtitle: Manage your classes, view student progress, and create engaging learning experiences.
teacherClasses.emptyAssignedHint: Your School Administrator will assign classes to you. Once assigned, they will appear here.
teacherClasses.emptyCreatedHint: Create your first class to get started. You can add students, share exams, lessons, and documents.
teacherClasses.clickToCreateFirst: Click the button above to create your first class
teacherClasses.quickTipText: Click on any class to view student details, track progress, and manage assignments. You can also create exams and lessons directly from the class page.
teacherClasses.addClassSubtitle: Add a class to your organization
teacherClasses.shareContentHint: Share exams, documents, and lessons with this class
teacherClasses.noStudentsHint: Click the button above to search and add students.
teacherClasses.noStudentsHintAssigned: Students will appear here once enrolled by the school administrator.
teacherClasses.shareExistingContentHint: Add exams, documents, and lessons to this class
teacherClasses.tip1: Use AI Exam Generator to quickly create assessments from your uploaded documents.
teacherClasses.tip2: Share the class code with students so they can easily find and join this class.
teacherClasses.tip3: Use AI Tutor to get teaching suggestions and content ideas for this subject.
teacherClasses.allExamsShared: All your exams are already shared with this class.
teacherClasses.allDocumentsShared: All your documents are already shared with this class.
teacherClasses.allLessonsShared: All your lessons are already shared with this class.
teacherClasses.removeConfirmMessage: Remove "{title}" from this class? The {type} won't be deleted, just unlinked from this class.
teacherClasses.useShareExamButtonAbove: Use the "Share Existing Exam" button above to add exams to this class.
teacherClasses.useShareDocumentButtonAbove: Use the "Share Existing Document" button above to add documents to this class.
teacherClasses.useShareLessonButtonAbove: Use the "Share Existing Lesson" button above to add lessons to this class.
teacherClasses.enrollSearchPlaceholderSaas: Search by name, email, or ID (min 2 characters)
teacherClasses.enrollNoStudentsInUnit: No available students in this unit
teacherClasses.enrollNoStudentsFound: No students found matching your search
teacherClasses.enrollStartTypingToSearch: Start typing to search for students (minimum 2 characters)
teacherClasses.enrollSelectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one student
teacherClasses.aiTutorDescriptionConnected: An AI tutor chat is connected to this class. Students can access it for help.
teacherClasses.aiTutorDescriptionNotConnected: Connect an AI tutor chat to this class. Students enrolled in this class can access it to get help with learning materials.
teacherClasses.aiTutorDocumentsContext: 1 document will be available for context
teacherClasses.aiTutorDocumentsContextPlural: {count} documents will be available for context
teacherClasses.aiTutorLinkDialogSubtitle: Select a chat to connect to this class
teacherClasses.aiTutorNoChatsToLink: No available chats to link. Create a new chat first.

teacherCalendar.title: Calendar Hub
teacherCalendar.tipClassFilter: Tip: Class filter is active. New items will default to {className}
teacherCalendar.createExamsOrLessons: Create exams or lessons to see them here
teacherCalendar.dragHint: Drag any item to a calendar slot to schedule
teacherCalendar.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this scheduled event?
